info.title: StudyCal API
info.description:
Complete API test collection for StudyCal.

Base URL: [http://localhost:5000/api](http://localhost:5000/api)

Auth: After login or register, copy the token from the response and set it as the collection variable 'token'. All protected routes use Bearer token auth automatically.

post.description: P1.0 — Kelola Authentikasi: Register new student account. Copy the returned token into the collection variable.
P1.0 — Kelola Authentikasi: Login with existing credentials.

get.description: P1.0 — Verify JWT token is valid and returns user info.
P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Get all courses belonging to the logged-in student.

post.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Create a new course for the logged-in student.

put.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Update course fields.

delete.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Delete course and cascade-delete all rubrics and tasks.

get.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Get all rubric components for a specific course.

post.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Add a rubric component to a course. category_id is optional.

put.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Update a rubric component.

delete.description: P2.0 — Kelola Kursus: Delete a rubric component.

get.description: Get pre-seeded task categories: Homework, Online Quiz, Exam, Project, Lab Report.

example.description: Updated: also covers VLAN and subnetting.
example.title: Midterm Exam — Computer Networks

get.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Get all tasks for the logged-in student, sorted by priority_score descending.

example.description: Covers OSI model, TCP/IP, routing protocols.
example.title: Midterm Exam — Computer Networks

post.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Create a task. priority_score is calculated automatically. 3 notifications are auto-scheduled.

example.description: Updated: also covers VLAN and subnetting.
example.title: Midterm Exam — Computer Networks

put.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Update task fields. Priority is recalculated automatically.

delete.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Delete a task and cascade-delete its notifications.

example.description: Updated: also covers VLAN and subnetting.
example.title: Midterm Exam — Computer Networks

patch.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Toggle is_completed on a task. Calling again un-completes it.

post.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Upload a .ics file to import events as tasks. Set course_id to assign all imported tasks to a course.

get.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Get all notifications for the logged-in student's tasks.
P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Get unsent notifications that are due now. Marks them as sent automatically. Called every 60s by the frontend.

patch.description: P3.0 — Kelola Tugas: Mark a notification as acknowledged (dismissed by the student).
